description: Literature Finder - 智能文献查找助手。集成多个学术数据库，提供AI驱动的文献摘要、智能推荐和引用管理功能

userStories.title: Create users table schema with Drizzle
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the users table to store user accounts.
acceptanceCriteria: Create users table with: id, email, password_hash, name, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at
Add indexes on email field for fast lookup
userStories.notes: Completed - users table created with all required fields, unique index on email, migration generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create literature table schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the literature table to store paper metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Create literature table with: id, title, authors, abstract, doi, publication_date, journal, citation_count, source, keywords (JSON), created_at, updated_at
Add indexes on doi and title fields
userStories.notes: Completed - literature table created with all required fields, indexes on doi and title, migrations generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create categories table schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the categories table for organizing literature.
acceptanceCriteria: Create categories table with: id, user_id, name, sort_order, is_default, created_at, updated_at
Add foreign key to users table
userStories.notes: Completed - categories table created with all required fields, foreign key to users table, migration generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create literature_categories junction table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create many-to-many relationship between literature and categories.
acceptanceCriteria: Create literature_categories table with: id, literature_id, category_id, created_at
Add foreign keys to literature and categories tables
userStories.notes: Completed - junction table created with foreign keys, migration generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create tags table schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the tags table for keyword tagging.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tags table with: id, user_id, name, color, created_at, updated_at
Add foreign key to users table
userStories.notes: Completed - tags table created with all required fields, foreign key to users, migration generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create literature_tags junction table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create many-to-many relationship between literature and tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Create literature_tags table with: id, literature_id, tag_id, created_at
Add foreign keys to literature and tags tables
userStories.notes: Completed - junction table created with foreign keys, migration generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create reading_lists table schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the reading_lists table for organizing reading tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Create reading_lists table with: id, user_id, name, description, created_at, updated_at
Add foreign key to users table
userStories.notes: Completed - reading_lists table created with all required fields, foreign key to users, migration generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create reading_list_items table schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the reading_list_items table for managing list contents.
acceptanceCriteria: Create reading_list_items table with: id, reading_list_id, literature_id, sort_order, reading_status (unread|reading|read), created_at, updated_at
Add foreign keys to reading_lists and literature tables
userStories.notes: Completed - reading_list_items table created with all required fields including reading_status enum, foreign keys, migration generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create search_history table schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the search_history table for storing search queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Create search_history table with: id, user_id, query, source, created_at
Add foreign key to users table
userStories.notes: Completed - search_history table created with all required fields, foreign key to users, migration generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create summaries table schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the summaries table for storing AI-generated summaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Create summaries table with: id, literature_id, length_level (short|medium|detailed), content, created_at, updated_at
Add foreign key to literature table
userStories.notes: Completed - summaries table created with all required fields including length_level, foreign key to literature, migration generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create user_settings table schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the user_settings table for storing user preferences.
acceptanceCriteria: Create user_settings table with: id, user_id, summary_length_level, default_export_format, notification_preferences (JSON), created_at, updated_at
Add foreign key to users table
userStories.notes: Completed - user_settings table created with all required fields including JSON notification_preferences, unique foreign key to users, migration generated, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement arXiv API integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate arXiv API for searching papers.
acceptanceCriteria: Create arxiv service with search and detail fetch methods
Implement XML parsing for arXiv response format
Map arXiv fields to unified literature schema
Add rate limiting (max 3 requests per second)
userStories.notes: Completed - arXiv service with search/detail methods, XML parsing, unified schema mapping, rate limiting (3/sec), error handling, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement PubMed API integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate PubMed API for searching papers.
acceptanceCriteria: Create pubmed service with search and detail fetch methods
Implement XML parsing for PubMed response format
Map PubMed fields to unified literature schema
Add rate limiting (max 3 requests per second)
userStories.notes: Completed - PubMed service with search/detail methods, XML parsing, unified schema mapping, rate limiting (3/sec), error handling, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Semantic Scholar API integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate Semantic Scholar API for searching papers.
acceptanceCriteria: Create semantic-scholar service with search and detail fetch methods
Implement JSON parsing for Semantic Scholar response format
Map Semantic Scholar fields to unified literature schema
Add rate limiting (max 100 requests per 5 minutes)
userStories.notes: Completed - Semantic Scholar service with search/detail methods, JSON parsing, unified schema mapping, rate limiting (1/100ms), error handling, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement unified literature search API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create a unified search endpoint that queries all sources.
acceptanceCriteria: Create /api/literature/search endpoint accepting query, source, filters parameters
Route search requests to appropriate source service based on source parameter
Aggregate results from all sources when source='all'
userStories.notes: Completed - unified searchLiterature function, source routing, aggregation for multiple sources, pagination support, unified format, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement user registration endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create a registration endpoint for new users.
acceptanceCriteria: Create /api/auth/register endpoint accepting email, password, name
Validate email format and password strength
userStories.notes: Completed - /api/auth/register endpoint with Zod validation, bcrypt hashing, duplicate check, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement user login endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create a login endpoint for user authentication.
userStories.notes: Completed - /api/auth/login endpoint with JWT 7-day expiry, password verification, login logging, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement JWT authentication middleware
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create middleware to verify JWT tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: Create auth middleware that extracts and verifies JWT from Authorization header
Attach user ID to request object on successful verification
Return 401 error on invalid or expired tokens
userStories.notes: Completed - middleware.ts with verifyAuth, requireAuth functions, token expiry handling, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Google OAuth flow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate Google OAuth for authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: Exchange OAuth code for user profile
Create or update user account from OAuth data

userStories.title: Implement save literature to library endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to save literature.
acceptanceCriteria: Check if literature exists by DOI, create if not
userStories.notes: Completed - /api/literature/save with auth, DOI check, auto-create literature, user_literature junction, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement get user literature library endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to fetch saved literature.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept filters: category_id, tag_id, search query
Return user's saved literature with metadata
userStories.notes: Completed - /api/literature/library with auth, search filter, pagination (page/limit), sorting (date/title/citation), typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement create category endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to create categories.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept name and sort_order in request body
Insert category into database with user_id
userStories.notes: Completed - POST /api/categories endpoint created with authentication, validation, and database insertion

userStories.title: Implement get user categories endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to fetch user categories.
acceptanceCriteria: Return user's categories sorted by sort_order
Include default categories if none exist
userStories.notes: Completed - GET /api/categories endpoint returns user categories with default fallback

userStories.title: Implement add literature to category endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to organize literature.
userStories.notes: Completed - POST /api/literature/{id}/categories endpoint with duplicate checking and DELETE method

userStories.title: Implement create tag endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to create tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept name and color in request body
Insert tag into database with user_id
userStories.notes: Completed - POST /api/tags endpoint with validation and color regex

userStories.title: Implement get user tags endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to fetch user tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Return user's tags with usage count
userStories.notes: Completed - GET /api/tags endpoint returns user tags

userStories.title: Implement add tag to literature endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to tag literature.
userStories.notes: Completed - POST /api/literature/{id}/tags endpoint with duplicate checking and DELETE method

userStories.title: Implement create reading list endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to create reading lists.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept name and description in request body
Insert reading list into database with user_id
userStories.notes: Completed - POST /api/reading-lists endpoint with validation

userStories.title: Implement get reading lists endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to fetch reading lists.
acceptanceCriteria: Return user's reading lists with literature count
userStories.notes: Completed - GET /api/reading-lists endpoint returns user reading lists

userStories.title: Implement add literature to reading list endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to add literature to lists.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept literature_id and reading_status in request body
userStories.notes: Completed - POST /api/literature/{id}/reading-lists endpoint with duplicate checking and DELETE method

userStories.title: Implement save search history endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to save search queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept query and source in request body
Clean up entries older than 30 days
userStories.notes: Completed - POST /api/search-history with validation, auto-cleanup, and authentication

userStories.title: Implement get search history endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to fetch search history.
acceptanceCriteria: Return last 30 days of search history sorted by date
userStories.notes: Completed - GET /api/search-history with 30-day filter and 100-entry limit

userStories.title: Integrate Zhipu GLM API for summary generation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate Zhipu GLM API for AI summaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Create glm service with chat completion method
Implement prompt template for literature summarization
Support three length levels: short (100 words), medium (300-500 words), detailed (800-1200 words)
Add error handling and retry logic
userStories.notes: Completed - GLM client with API integration, prompts for all length levels, and mock fallback

userStories.title: Implement generate literature summary endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to generate summaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Check cache before generating new summary
Call GLM API to generate summary
userStories.notes: Completed - POST /api/literature/{id}/summary with caching, GLM integration, and database storage

userStories.title: Implement get literature summary endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to fetch existing summaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Return null if no summary exists
userStories.notes: Completed - GET /api/literature/{id}/summary with length_level parameter and 404 when not found

userStories.title: Implement citation export endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an endpoint to export citations.
userStories.notes: Completed - GET /api/literature/{id}/export with format parameter and file download headers

userStories.title: Implement citation formatting utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create a utility for formatting citations.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement formatCitation function accepting literature object and format type
userStories.notes: Completed - Citation formatter supporting BibTeX, APA, MLA, Chicago with author formatting and bibliography export

userStories.title: Implement user settings endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create endpoints for user preferences.
acceptanceCriteria: Create GET /api/settings endpoint to fetch user settings
Create PUT /api/settings endpoint to update user settings
userStories.notes: Completed - GET/POST /api/settings with validation, default values, and create-or-update logic

userStories.title: Initialize Next.js project with TypeScript and Tailwind
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to set up the Next.js project structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize Next.js 14+ project with App Router
